content:
type: STATUS
files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
summary: Done: edit_files(self, filenames: cabc.Iterable[str]) makes ONE subprocess.Popen call joining all quoted filenames into a single command string (e.g. editor "a" "b"), not per-file - please add your process_priority kwargs computation to that single Popen call in edit_files. termui.edit() now builds a filenames tuple from str|Iterable[str] and calls ed.edit_files(filenames). Feel free to layer process_priority param on top of Editor.__init__ and edit()/edit_files() - no structural conflict expected.
